title: Create: Connected Fabric
description: QoL blocks that you wish existed in Create - Highly configurable, disable what you don't need
body:
This is a Fabric port of [Create: Connected by Lysine](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-connected).
All rights belong to Lysine.

## ✅ Full port — all features from Forge version 1.1.13 are implemented!

This includes:
- All kinetic blocks (gearboxes, clutches, shear pin, brake, kinetic bridge, kinetic battery, crank wheel)
- All copycat blocks (slab, block, beam, vertical step, stairs, fence, fence gate, wall, board)
- Item Silo and Fluid Vessel
- Contraption behaviors and mounted storage
- Sequenced Pulse Generator and Control Chip
- Linked Transmitter and Linked Buttons
- Configs and Feature Toggle system
- Fan Catalysts (all types)
- Ponders, recipes, advancements, and datagen
- Mod compat (Copycats+, Additional Placements)
- Dedicated server support

## Usage
Usage conditions are the same as for the original mod.

## Issues
For Fabric-specific bugs, report them on this port's repository.
For bugs that also occur on Forge, report them on the [upstream repository](https://github.com/hlysine/create_connected).
